query:
ALTER TABLE invoices
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceType ENUM('factura','abono') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'factura',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT 'redsys',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofKey TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isAutomatic TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteForId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteReason TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;

  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS invoiceType ENUM('factura','abono') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'factura',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod ENUM('redsys','transferencia','efectivo','otro') DEFAULT 'redsys',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedBy INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentValidatedAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofUrl TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS transferProofKey TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isAutomatic TINYINT(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteForId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS creditNoteReason TEXT DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS lastSentAt DATETIME DEFAULT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentCount INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0;
